prose: **Frontier-Orbital HOMO–LUMO Gap of O₂** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier standard), exact four-center integrals (no density fitting), PySCF backend, gas phase, charge 0, open-shell multiplicity 3 (triplet). Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` file, single-point evaluation (no relaxation). SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO (index 15) = −8.8740 eV, LUMO (index 16) = −3.5859 eV → **HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.288 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital separation, not transition energy). No warnings reported. Calculated via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill. Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 3 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz`.
